topic: 2028 Democratic nominee candidate poll and market watch
source_note: Seed snapshot transcribed from the image text shared in Discord #the-tide-pool. Corrected after audit: the source columns are Candidate / Markets / Polling / Read. V2 stores vibes ingredients and derives the displayed bar from weighted component scores.

rows.note: CA gov, shadow campaign, has network and timing; coastal-progressive brand risk.
rows.vibes_rationale: Technically skilled, but the polish cracks under sustained exposure and the positive story reads PR-shaped.
rows.evidence_notes: California governing record; extensive national media exposure; shadow-campaign signals.
rows.liability_notes: CA machine-polish; coastal-progressive brand risk; scripted affect under sustained exposure.

rows.note: Leads polling on name ID; markets discount donor comeback risk less than operatives do.
rows.vibes_rationale: High name ID, but the public style still reads scripted, institutional, and backward-linked to 2024.
rows.evidence_notes: 2020 and 2024 national campaign record; VP record; high name ID polling.
rows.liability_notes: 2024 loss; donor skepticism; scripted institutional style; backward-looking brand.

rows.note: Obama-tier grassroots energy; general-election ceiling is the priced risk.
rows.vibes_rationale: Authentic, materially specific, and strong at fight-picking; the positive national vision is the weaker leg.
rows.evidence_notes: Long-form interviews; grassroots fundraising; clear issue advocacy and hostile-media reps.
rows.liability_notes: General-election ceiling concern; positive national unity story less proven than combat/story specificity.

rows.note: PA gov, disciplined Rust Belt messenger; 2026 reelection comes first.
rows.vibes_rationale: Competent patriotic-repair lane with Rust Belt discipline; warmth and long-form ease are less proven nationally.
rows.evidence_notes: Pennsylvania executive record; disciplined Rust Belt messaging; crisis response profile.
rows.liability_notes: 2026 reelection gate; national long-form warmth less proven; Gaza/education fights may complicate primary.

rows.note: High measured favorability and communication skill; no governor track record or structural base.
rows.vibes_rationale: Probably the cleanest communicator for optimistic repair and long-form normie persuasion.
rows.evidence_notes: Long-form interviews; Fox/news hits; high measured favorability where tested.
rows.liability_notes: No governor track record; weak structural base; 2020 coalition ceiling still a question.

rows.note: IL gov, deep pockets, anti-Trump fighter posture; could buy into top tier on populist economics.
rows.vibes_rationale: Has fight-picking and material Illinois delivery; authenticity has improved, though the billionaire frame still drags.
rows.evidence_notes: Illinois governing record; economic-populist messaging; anti-Trump fight posture.
rows.liability_notes: Billionaire frame; can read over-managed; national voter familiarity limited.

rows.note: Georgia-incumbent story depends on Senate reelection first.
rows.vibes_rationale: Calm and polished, but the national story and unscripted emotional texture are still thin.
rows.evidence_notes: Georgia Senate record; calm media presence; incumbent swing-state story.
rows.liability_notes: Must win reelection; national story thin; limited unscripted emotional texture.

rows.note: MD gov, Rhodes scholar, combat vet; likely underpriced if markets omit him.
rows.vibes_rationale: Service biography, tone, and material story fit the thesis; long-form proof is thinner, but the signals are strong.
rows.evidence_notes: Maryland executive record; service biography; memoir/public speaking profile.
rows.liability_notes: Limited national testing; long-form proof thinner than the biography; early hype risk.

rows.note: Two-term KY gov, southern, religious, moderate; fits the post-2024 candidate-shape argument.
rows.vibes_rationale: Red-state crisis governing gives him competence, decency, specificity, and low-key authentic hope.
rows.evidence_notes: Two-term Kentucky governing record; disaster response; red-state reelection proof.
rows.liability_notes: Low national exposure; moderate lane may blur in a primary; national fight selection untested.

rows.note: AZ senator, Marine combat vet, Latino, strong 2024 ticket-split overperformance.
rows.vibes_rationale: Marine vet origin story, swing-state proof, and fight-without-ideology coding make the profile unusually complete.
rows.evidence_notes: Arizona Senate win; Marine biography; ticket-split overperformance.
rows.liability_notes: Limited national testing; Senate record still new; inferred more from profile than campaign exposure.

rows.note: NC gov, won big while Harris lost the state; serious technocrat profile.
rows.vibes_rationale: Competence-and-AG-fight profile fits, but long-form national self and positive vision are still untested.
rows.evidence_notes: North Carolina win; attorney-general record; technocratic executive profile.
rows.liability_notes: Low national profile; positive vision and long-form persona mostly untested.

rows.note: AZ senator, ex-astronaut, ex-Navy, Giffords; clean competent-adult template, low ambition signal.
rows.vibes_rationale: Competent patriotic adult template with broad appeal, but he has not shown much appetite for narrative politics.
rows.evidence_notes: Arizona Senate record; Navy/astronaut biography; broad competence brand.
rows.liability_notes: Low ambition signal; narrative politics not a strength; restrained affect may not travel.

rows.note: GA senator, Black pastor, won Georgia three times in four years.
rows.vibes_rationale: Natural moral-patriotic storyteller who can name pain without sounding small or synthetic.
rows.evidence_notes: Georgia statewide wins; pastoral speaking style; moral-patriotic campaign message.
rows.liability_notes: National-primary appetite unknown; Senate lane may not translate; market omission risk.

rows.note: MI gov, strong Electoral College math; stock has slipped and gender handwringing weighs on the read.
rows.vibes_rationale: Lived threat, executive record, and fight-picking are real; the story has not fully translated beyond Michigan.
rows.evidence_notes: Michigan executive record; post-kidnapping threat history; national surrogate role.
rows.liability_notes: Stock has slipped; gender handwringing; story not fully translated beyond Michigan.

rows.note: MI senator, ex-CIA, security-credentialed moderate; pure dark horse.
rows.vibes_rationale: CIA-pragmatist-moderate profile is authentic and materially specific, but the positive vision is still unfinished.
rows.evidence_notes: Michigan Senate win; national-security biography; moderate pragmatist brand.
rows.liability_notes: Pure dark horse; positive vision unfinished; limited national charisma testing.

rows.note: CT senator with aggressive post-2024 fight-harder messaging.
rows.vibes_rationale: Fight-picking is strong, but the positive story is weak and the style can read sermonic.
rows.evidence_notes: Post-2024 fight-harder messaging; Senate issue advocacy; long-running gun-safety profile.
rows.liability_notes: Can sound sermonic; positive story lags fight posture; New England senator lane.

rows.note: CO gov, term-limited in 2026, anti-orthodoxy moderate-libertarian Democrat, out gay.
rows.vibes_rationale: Independent, relaxed, and anti-orthodox enough for long-form appeal; national emotional story is fuzzy.
rows.evidence_notes: Colorado executive record; anti-orthodoxy positioning; relaxed media style.
rows.liability_notes: National emotional story fuzzy; libertarian-moderate profile may confuse primary voters.

rows.note: HI senator, smart progressive policy profile, low national profile.
rows.vibes_rationale: Smart and humane policy voice, but low-profile Senate affect does not yet carry the thesis.
rows.evidence_notes: Senate policy work; smart progressive voice; climate/policy credibility.
rows.liability_notes: Low national profile; Senate affect; limited proof of campaign-stage magnetism.

rows.note: Filibuster-record protest moment got attention; 2020 ceiling may still bind.
rows.vibes_rationale: Positive-hopeful language is real but overplayed enough to feel rehearsed; fight-picking can turn theatrical.
rows.evidence_notes: 2020 campaign; Senate record; filibuster protest visibility.
rows.liability_notes: Hope language can feel over-rehearsed; 2020 ceiling; fight-picking can turn theatrical.

rows.note: MN gov, 2024 VP nominee; bench cred but the loss drags on ceiling.
rows.vibes_rationale: Natural long-form performer with normal affect and a real vernacular, though 2024 makes the story contested.
rows.evidence_notes: Minnesota governing record; 2024 VP run; natural long-form/vernacular media style.
rows.liability_notes: 2024 loss overhang; VP brand tied to failed ticket; national story contested.

rows.note: Former NC gov, two-term swing-state executive, awkward post-office timeline.
rows.vibes_rationale: Pleasant and competent, but the story is not distinctive enough yet and long-form would likely be fine rather than magnetic.
rows.evidence_notes: Two-term North Carolina governorship; swing-state executive record.
rows.liability_notes: Post-office timing; low distinctiveness; long-form likely fine rather than magnetic.

rows.note: Businessman-celebrity outsider lane; credible for the genre but still longshot.
rows.vibes_rationale: Excellent long-form authenticity and material business language, but office ambition and primary trust are real questions.
rows.evidence_notes: Long-form business/media presence; outsider brand; consumer/business specificity.
rows.liability_notes: Not a conventional Democrat; office ambition unclear; primary trust barrier.

rows.note: Reportedly gearing up; probably not viable but reliably appears on lists.
rows.vibes_rationale: Authentic about who he is, unfortunately; old-war-room insider is wrong for the moment.
rows.evidence_notes: Long public record; reported ambition; known operator persona.
rows.liability_notes: Old-war-room insider brand; combative without renewal story; probably wrong for the moment.

vibes_check.definition: Patriotic repair: optimistic about America, emotionally normal, clear-eyed without doom, picks fights against systems/abusers/Trumpism rather than voters, and can survive long-form unscripted media without feeling synthetic.
vibes_check.note: Shown beside, not inside, the market/poll model. The schema preserves the component disagreement underneath the single displayed bar.
vibes_check.hypothesis: If the thesis is right, higher Vibes Check candidates should begin to improve in polling and/or markets as voters pay closer attention.
vibes_check.label: Subjective read on patriotic-repair affect, derived from component scores and confidence notes.

vibes_model.score_field: derived at render time from vibes_dimensions

dimensions.hope_story: Can they tell a positive future-facing story?
dimensions.material_specificity: Are there concrete policies/examples under the story?
dimensions.authentic_longform: Can they hold up in low-filter long-form settings?
dimensions.problem_clarity: Can they name what is broken without sounding doom-only?
dimensions.fight_selection: Do they pick fights that clarify the story instead of performing combat?

vibes_model.note: The displayed vibes_score is a weighted average of the five stored ingredients, not a hand-entered primary field.
